message.title: Message
message.default: 密码已更新，请重新登录

DashboardActivity.title: DashboardActivity
DashboardActivity.description: Dashboard 最近动态条目（D-5 前 stub 结构预留）。

avg_processing_duration_seconds.title: Avg Processing Duration Seconds
avg_processing_duration_seconds.description: 已完成文档平均入库耗时（秒）；无样本时为 null

ingestion_success_rate.title: Ingestion Success Rate
ingestion_success_rate.description: completed / (completed + failed) × 100；无终态文档时为 null

chat_message_count.title: Chat Message Count
chat_message_count.description: Wave 3 对话表就绪前恒为 0

member_count.title: Member Count
member_count.description: 团队成员数；个人版为 null

recent_kb_id.title: Recent Kb Id
recent_kb_id.description: 可见范围内最近活跃资料库 id；无库时为 null

recent_activities.title: Recent Activities
recent_activities.description: 最近动态（D-5 前恒为空数组）

golden_hit_rate_percent.title: Golden Hit Rate Percent
golden_hit_rate_percent.description: golden_qa Hit@3 生产基线命中率（%，EW-C2 rag_baseline.py）

golden_baseline_evaluated_at.title: Golden Baseline Evaluated At
golden_baseline_evaluated_at.description: golden 生产基线最近评估时间（UTC）

avg_retrieval_latency_ms.title: Avg Retrieval Latency Ms
avg_retrieval_latency_ms.description: 近 7 日 workspace 内 assistant 消息平均检索耗时（ms）；无样本 null

retrieval_latency_sample_count.title: Retrieval Latency Sample Count
retrieval_latency_sample_count.description: 参与 avg_retrieval_latency_ms 计算的 assistant 消息数

document_retry_count_7d.title: Document Retry Count 7D
document_retry_count_7d.description: 近 7 日 visible 范围内 document.retry 审计条数（Plan-3E-6b / ORG-3.5）

storage_cleanup_failure_count.title: Storage Cleanup Failure Count
storage_cleanup_failure_count.description: visible 范围内 storage.cleanup_failed 审计累计条数（Plan-3E-6b / ORG-3.5）

HistoryCitationPayload.title: HistoryCitationPayload
HistoryCitationPayload.description: 历史消息引用；不可见库时附带 source_status（ORG-1.7）。

SearchDocumentItem.title: SearchDocumentItem
SearchDocumentItem.description: 单条跨库搜索结果（文件名或正文模式）。
